title: HaloDoc - Telemedicine and Health Services Platform
problem: Healthcare access is limited in emerging markets. Patients cannot easily consult doctors or access health services.
solution: Comprehensive digital health platform offering telemedicine, pharmacy delivery, and health content.
varden_fit: Low — APAC market, different regulatory environment. Interesting model to study.
notes: APAC super-app health model. Different market but interesting benchmark.
